title: delivery.rs status 202 check is redundant
description: delivery.rs deliver_one() line 280: 'if status.is_success() || status == 202'. StatusCode 202 Accepted is already in the 2xx range, so is_success() already covers it. The '|| status == 202' is dead code that suggests the author was uncertain about reqwest's is_success() behavior. Remove the redundant check and add a brief comment if desired.
